disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly increasing tight abdominal swelling over two weeks, acutely worse in the last 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: How long has the swelling been building up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been growing for a couple of weeks but it's blown up in the last two days — his belly is huge and tight now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cannot lie flat — severe breathlessness relieved only by sitting up (mechanical respiratory compromise)
trigger_question_examples: Can he lie down flat, or does he have to sit up to breathe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He can't lie flat at all — the swelling pushes up and he can't get his breath unless he's propped right up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New drowsiness, confusion, muddled thinking and forgetfulness noticed by family over the last day or two
trigger_question_examples: Has his thinking or alertness changed?
Is he more drowsy or confused than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — he's really drowsy and muddled, forgetting things and not making sense. That's not like him.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Yellowing of the skin and the whites of the eyes
trigger_question_examples: Has his skin or eyes changed colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His skin and the whites of his eyes have gone yellow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known advanced liver disease with high pressure in the liver blood vessels; heavy bleeding from ruptured gullet veins about a year ago
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any liver problems?
Has he ever bled from his gut or gullet before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's got advanced liver disease with high pressure in the liver veins, and about a year ago he bled badly from ruptured veins in his gullet and was in hospital.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prescribed water tablets and lactulose syrup, but none taken for about a week because of the confusion
trigger_question_examples: What medications is he on, and has he been taking them?
Has he missed any of his usual tablets or syrup?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's meant to take two water tablets and a lactulose syrup, but he hasn't managed them for about a week because he's been so muddled.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood and no black tarry stools today (screening question — currently negative)
trigger_question_examples: Has he vomited any blood or anything like coffee grounds?
Have his stools gone black or tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he hasn't vomited any blood and I haven't seen any black stools today.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so, but he's been in bed — I'll keep an eye on it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and the belly is not sore to touch as far as the family can tell (does not exclude infected ascitic fluid)
trigger_question_examples: Has he had any fever or shivers?
Is his tummy painful or tender when touched?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't felt hot or shivery, and the belly doesn't seem sore when I help him — just huge and tight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound weakness and muscle wasting, early fullness when eating, and discomfort under the left ribs
trigger_question_examples: How is his strength and energy?
Any change in appetite or discomfort anywhere else?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's completely drained and has lost a lot of muscle; he fills up after just a few mouthfuls and gets an ache under the left ribs.
